title: [Netflix] Charlie Wilson's War 韋氏風雲

replies.msg:
套戲關於美國援助阿富汗 不妨睇吓呢套 Charlie Wilson
War
https://www.netflix.com/title/70060021?s=i&trkid=13747225

係關於一位國會議員點暗中援助當年阿富汗對抗蘇聯 最後蘇聯退兵 但留低咗個爛攤子

These things happened. They were glorious and they changed the world... and then we fucked up the end game.
